notes:
v2.5.7 Update
⚔️ Actor nameplate rotation: Rotate actor name text from Global HUD Layout or per-actor Internal Offsets.
🧩 Adapter custom categories: Custom Action Menu categories can now be appended after third-party adapter categories without duplicating system-backed buttons.

announcement.title: ⚔️ Stylish Action HUD v2.5.7
announcement.content:
v2.5.7 adds actor nameplate rotation and improves custom Action Menu category handling for system adapters.

  • Actor nameplate rotation: Use the new Name Rotation field in Global HUD Layout or per-actor Internal Offsets to rotate actor name text.
  • Adapter custom categories: Custom categories can now appear after third-party adapter categories, while system-backed layout entries are skipped to avoid duplicate buttons.
